channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Lauren Macuga wins a World Cup super-G race with Lindsey Vonn 4th on stellar day for US ski team
item.description: ST. ANTON, Austria (AP) — Breakout star Lauren Macuga and comeback queen Lindsey Vonn made it a classic Sunday for the United States ski team.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Australian Open: Olympic champ Zheng Qinwen starts her bid for another final on a rainy Day 1
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Zheng Qinwen's tennis resume is quite different from what it was when she showed up at the Australian Open a full year ago.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Clear skies and clear minds: Rams regroup in Arizona to prepare for playoff game vs. Vikings
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Everything seemed pretty normal for the Los Angeles Rams during Saturday's practice at their temporary home on a beautiful afternoon in suburban Phoenix.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up at the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jackson and Henry lead the way as the Ravens run over the rival Steelers 28-14 in the AFC playoffs
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Lamar Jackson handed off to Derrick Henry, then slid out to the left as if he still had the ball. A couple linebackers shifted into Jackson's path, leaving the middle open for Henry to run through for a 44-yard touchdown.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Texans get 2 points on blocked extra point return vs. Chargers, 1st in NFL playoff history
item.description: Houston’s D’Angelo Ross returned a blocked extra point for two points in the fourth quarter of the Texans wild-card playoff game against the Los Angeles Chargers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How you can snag $10 tickets to a Utah Hockey Club game
item.description: If you've been eager to be a part of Utah Hockey Club's inaugural season but felt a little overwhelmed by the price of tickets, you may have a chance to snag tickets for just $10 apiece.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Emeka Eneli, Diego Luna called to USMNT Camp after breakout seasons
item.description: Real Salt Lake midfielder Emeka Eneli and Diego Luna's stellar 2024 MLS campaigns have been rewarded with call-ups to the U.S. Men's National Team's January training camp, making a pivotal moment in their burgeoning careers.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Buccaneers beat Saints 27-19 to clinch NFC South and wide receiver Mike Evans surpasses 1,000 yards
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Just 36 seconds away from clinching the NFC South title, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers had another goal to achieve. Take a knee on their 32-yard line and run out the clock? No chance. Mike Evans still needed 5 yards to make history.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Patriots fire coach Jerod Mayo shortly after beating Bills to finish his lone season at 4-13
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — The New England Patriots fired coach Jerod Mayo on Sunday after one season, beginning another reboot for the franchise just a year after it parted with longtime coach Bill Belichick.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears rally for 24-22 win in Green Bay as Packers lose Love and Watson to injuries
item.description: Caleb Williams drove Chicago to Cairo Santos' 51-yard field goal as time expired and the Bears snapped a 10-game skid with a 24-22 victory over the playoff-bound Green Bay Packers, who lost quarterback Jordan Love and wide receiver Christian Watson to injuries on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears walk-off the Packers to end the season 5-12
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wisc. (WGN) — For the first time in weeks, The Chicago Bears showed life in the NFL's oldest rivalry and found a way to win at the end of the ballgame. Here's how their final contest of the 2024-25 regular season played out.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
